detection_signals: All Sherry has flor on the surface
Flor is required for every type of Sherry
Oloroso Sherry develops flor just like Fino
why_incorrect: Flor naturally develops on some Sherry wines. Fino and Manzanilla deliberately cultivate flor. Oloroso, by contrast, intentionally suppresses flor development.
misconception: Flor yeast develops on the surface of all Sherry wines and is essential for all Sherry production.
corrected_understanding: Flor develops naturally on Fino and Manzanilla Sherry but is deliberately suppressed in Oloroso production. Flor is not universal to all Sherry styles.
